subject: TOOL-CACHE implementation source-level validation
methodology: source-level inspection (tests cannot run due to pre-existing cross-lane bug in tool-graph.ts:207 Pipeable.js TypeError)

typecheck.detail: Zero type errors in the 6 target files. All 200+ type errors in bun typecheck are pre-existing in unrelated files (campaign/, tool/registry.test.ts, capability-proxy-bisect.test.ts).

OBJ-001.requirement: serviceOption pattern + cache.available span with true/false values
OBJ-001.evidence: tool.ts:192-197 — Effect.serviceOption(ToolCache.Service) with cache.available: 'false' (line 194) and cache.available: 'true' (line 197)

OBJ-002.requirement: miss_reason, key_kind, result_source spans covering all 4 result sources and miss reasons
gaps: Minor: No miss_reason: 'not_found' on cold miss — derivable by exclusion but less queryable

OBJ-003.requirement: invalidation span coverage: cache.invalidated, cache.invalidation_scope, cache.invalidation_entries, cache.invalidation_bytes, cache.invalidation_trigger_tool
OBJ-003.evidence: tools.ts:119-124 — all 5 required fields present, invalidation_scope: 'full'
gaps: Minor: No cache.invalidated: false annotation when tool is cacheable (absence is signal, but not queryable)
Minor: No partial/per-key invalidation spans (invalidateKey exists but is never called)

OBJ-004.requirement: sessionID + agent included in cache key
OBJ-004.evidence: cache-key.ts:35 — payload = `${toolID}|${sessionID}|${agent}|${normalized}`. Verified: changing either sessionID or agent produces different SHA256 hash.

OBJ-005.requirement: 6 pipeline tests: (a) maxEntrySize bypass, (b) permission bypass on cache hit, (c) abort signal interaction

evidence.tests_at_wrong_layer: All 6 tests exercise ToolCache.Service directly via testEffect(ToolCache.defaultLayer), NOT the pipeline wired into tool.ts wrap().
evidence.condition_b: NOT IMPLEMENTED — requires full pipeline layer (wrap()) to test ctx.ask bypass on cache hit
evidence.condition_c: NOT IMPLEMENTED — requires full pipeline layer to test abort signal interaction with cached results

gaps: No TTL/expiry test (TestClock available but unused)
Heavy as any casts on cache service — discards type safety
Mislabeled: file name says 'cache-pipeline' but tests cache layer only

OBJ-006.requirement: read.ts LSP caching fix — cacheable config with LSP-aware TTL
OBJ-006.evidence: read.ts:353-360 — cacheable: { ttl: '3 minutes', maxSize: 256 * 1024 } with inline commentary about LSP buffer staleness and write-side invalidation

OBJ-007.requirement: deferred freshness — no mtimes in cache key
OBJ-007.evidence: cache-key.ts has zero filesystem imports and zero mtime references. FreshnessCheck (Effect.Effect<boolean>) defers to cache-hit time.

COND-008.requirement: tapDefect before orDie in pipeline composition
COND-008.evidence: tool.ts:375-382 — Effect.tapDefect (line 376) pipes into Effect.orDie (line 382). Correct ordering: defect observed before fiber killed.

pipeline_structure.claimed: decode → cache → truncate → retry → timeout → semaphore → span
pipeline_structure.actual: decode → cache(getOrCompute wrapping execute) → truncate → retry → timeout → semaphore → tap/tapError → tapDefect → orDie → span
concerns: core gen block (lines 180-233) combines decode+cache+execute+truncate — retry re-runs all of them including cache-key derivation
Truncation inside retry boundary — could be retried unnecessarily on truncate service failure
tap/tapError telemetry layers between semaphore and tapDefect safety net — a defect in tapError would escape before tapDefect catches it (mitigated by internal catchAll)

write_side_invalidation.trigger: Non-cacheable tools (edit, write, smart_batch, bash, smart_bash, smart_find, smart_grep, smart_git, task, etc.)
write_side_invalidation.scope: full cache invalidate() — flushes all entries
write_side_invalidation.graceful_degradation: Uses serviceOption — silent skip if ToolCache.Service not in layer graph
write_side_invalidation.mcp_tool_gap: MCP tools (lines 160-249) have NO invalidation block — write-capable MCP tools produce stale reads

details: No mtimes in key derivation — pure function

git_diff_audit.note: Non-target modifications are pre-existing cross-lane work (.opencode/tools/, packages/desktop/, packages/app/, campaign files, telemetry JSONL). No tool-cache files have unintended changes.

defects.description: smart_grep missing cacheable:true causes unnecessary full cache invalidation on every read-only grep call. Add cacheable: true or cacheable: { ttl: '3 minutes', maxSize: 256 * 1024 }.
Mislabeled — tests cache layer not pipeline. Missing COND-005(b+c) tests for permission bypass and abort signal interaction.
No TTL/expiry test — TestClock available via testEffect helper but unused.
core gen block (lines 180-233) too large — retry re-runs decode+cache-key derivation unnecessarily.
MCP tools have no cache invalidation block — write-capable MCP tools can leave stale cached reads.
Missing miss_reason: 'not_found' annotation on cold cache miss — less queryable in observability dashboards.

admission_rationale: Core implementation is sound: deterministic key derivation, correct span annotation coverage, proper tapDefect/orDie ordering, working write-side invalidation, and 6 tests exercising real code paths. The one must-fix defect (D1: smart_grep missing cacheable:true) is a single-line fix that does not require architectural change. D2-D6 are quality improvements deferred to future slices.
admission_condition: Repair D1 before publication. D2-D6 may be deferred.
